name: gpt-4o-mini-transcribe
description: A speech-to-text model that uses GPT-4o mini to transcribe audio

audio_file.description: The audio file to transcribe. Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, or webm
audio_file.title: Audio File

language.description: The language of the input audio. Supplying the input language in ISO-639-1 (e.g. en) format will improve accuracy and latency.
language.title: Language

prompt.description: An optional text to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment. The prompt should match the audio language.
prompt.title: Prompt
